glosses.zh-Hans: 银行代码; 银行识别码
glosses.yue: 銀行代碼; 銀行識別碼
glosses.vi: mã ngân hàng; mã định danh ngân hàng
glosses.ja: 銀行コード; 銀行識別番号

sentences.target: Ich brauche deine Bankleitzahl für die Überweisung.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈbaŋklaɪ̯t͡tsaːl fyːɐ̯ diː ˌyːbɐˈvaɪ̯zʊŋ./

translations.de: Ich brauche deine Bankleitzahl für die Überweisung.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈbaŋklaɪ̯t͡tsaːl fyːɐ̯ diː ˌyːbɐˈvaɪ̯zʊŋ./
translations.en: I need your bank code for the transfer.
translations.es: Necesito tu código bancario para la transferencia.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin de ton code bancaire pour le virement.
translations.it: Ho bisogno del tuo codice bancario per il bonifico.
translations.zh-Hans: 转账需要你的银行代码。
translations.yue: 我轉賬要你嘅銀行代碼。
translations.ru: Мне нужен твой банковский код для перевода.
translations.pt: Preciso do seu código bancário para a transferência.
translations.he: אני צריך את קוד הבנק שלך להעברה.
translations.tr: Transfer için senin banka koduna ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần mã ngân hàng của bạn để chuyển khoản.
translations.ar: أحتاج إلى رمز البنك الخاص بك لإجراء التحويل.
translations.nl: Ik heb je bankcode nodig voor de overschrijving.
translations.uk: Мені потрібен твій банківський код для переказу.
translations.hu: Szükségem van a banki kódodra az utaláshoz.
translations.hi: ट्रांसफ़र के लिए मुझे तुम्हारा बैंक कोड चाहिए.
translations.pl: Potrzebuję twojego kodu bankowego do przelewu.
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι τον τραπεζικό σου κωδικό για τη μεταφορά.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger bankkoden din for overføringen.
translations.id: Aku butuh kode bank kamu untuk transfer.
translations.sv: Jag behöver din bankkod för överföringen.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de codul tău bancar pentru transfer.
translations.cs: Potřebuji tvůj bankovní kód pro převod.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for din bankkode til overførslen.
translations.ja: 振込のためにあなたの銀行コードが必要です。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb, present tense, 1st person singular; selects an accusative direct object.
Possessive determiner agreeing with a feminine singular noun in accusative; modifies 'Bankleitzahl'.
Common noun (feminine), compound ('Bank'+'Leit'+'Zahl'); accusative direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces purpose phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Überweisung' after 'für'.
Common noun (feminine); accusative object of the preposition 'für' indicating purpose.

sentences.target: Die Bankleitzahl steht auf dem Formular.

translations.de: Die Bankleitzahl steht auf dem Formular.
translations.en: The bank code is on the form.
translations.es: El código bancario está en el formulario.
translations.fr: Le code bancaire est sur le formulaire.
translations.it: Il codice bancario è sul modulo.
translations.pt: O código bancário está no formulário.
translations.vi: Mã ngân hàng nằm trên mẫu đơn.
translations.nl: De bankcode staat op het formulier.
translations.hu: A banki kód az űrlapon van.
translations.el: Ο τραπεζικός κωδικός είναι στη φόρμα.
translations.ja: 銀行コードはフォームにあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun (feminine); nominative subject of the clause.
Intransitive verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; denotes being located/listed.
Preposition; here with dative to express static location.
Definite article, neuter singular dative; determiner of 'Formular' after 'auf' (location).
Common noun (neuter); dative object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Du kannst mir die Bankleitzahl schicken.

translations.de: Du kannst mir die Bankleitzahl schicken.
translations.en: You can send me the bank code.
translations.fr: Tu peux m’envoyer le code bancaire.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把银行代码发给我。
translations.yue: 你可以發畀我銀行代碼。
translations.pt: Você pode me enviar o código bancário.
translations.he: אתה יכול לשלוח לי את קוד הבנק.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể gửi cho tôi mã ngân hàng.
translations.ar: يمكنك أن ترسل لي رمز البنك.
translations.nl: Je kunt me de bankcode sturen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш надіслати мені банківський код.
translations.hi: तुम मुझे बैंक कोड भेज सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να μου στείλεις τον τραπεζικό κωδικό.
translations.id: Kamu bisa kirim kode bank ke aku.
translations.sv: Du kan skicka bankkoden till mig.
translations.ja: 私に銀行コードを送ってもいいよ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive 'schicken'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Bankleitzahl'.
Common noun (feminine); accusative direct object of 'schicken'.
Main verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'kannst'.

sentences.target: Ich gebe dir gleich die Bankleitzahl.

translations.de: Ich gebe dir gleich die Bankleitzahl.
translations.en: I’ll give you the bank code in a moment.
translations.es: En un momento te doy el código bancario.
translations.fr: Je te donne le code bancaire dans un instant.
translations.it: Tra un attimo ti do il codice bancario.
translations.zh-Hans: 我一会儿把银行代码给你。
translations.yue: 我一陣就俾你銀行代碼。
translations.pt: Daqui a pouco te passo o código bancário.
translations.he: עוד רגע אתן לך את קוד הבנק.
translations.tr: Az sonra sana banka kodunu vereceğim.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ gửi mã ngân hàng cho bạn ngay thôi.
translations.nl: Ik geef je zo de bankcode.
translations.hu: Mindjárt odaadom neked a banki kódot.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़ी देर में तुम्हें बैंक कोड दे दूंगा.
translations.pl: Za chwilę dam ci kod bankowy.
translations.el: Σε λίγο θα σου δώσω τον τραπεζικό κωδικό.
translations.nb: Jeg gir deg bankkoden om et øyeblikk.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi aku kasih kode banknya.
translations.sv: Jag ger dig bankkoden om en liten stund.
translations.cs: Za chvíli ti dám bankovní kód.
translations.da: Jeg giver dig bankkoden om lidt.
translations.ja: すぐ銀行コードを伝えるね。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Ditransitive verb, present tense, 1st person singular; takes dative ('dir') and accusative ('die Bankleitzahl').
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object/recipient.
Temporal adverb modifying 'gebe'; indicates immediacy.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Bankleitzahl'.
Common noun (feminine); accusative direct object of 'gebe'.
